mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dc3_device_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type_flag = 1) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dc3_driver_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type_flag = 1) AS total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dc3_device_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type_flag = 1 AND confirm_flag = 0) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dc3_driver_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type_flag = 1 AND confirm_flag = 0) AS unconfirmed

SELECT 'device' AS source, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dc3_device_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type_flag = 1) AS total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dc3_device_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type_flag = 1 AND confirm_flag = 0) AS unconfirmed UNION ALL SELECT 'driver' AS source, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dc3_driver_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type_flag = 1) AS total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dc3_driver_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type_flag = 1 AND confirm_flag = 0) AS unconfirmed

SELECT event_type_flag::text AS key, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ( SELECT event_type_flag FROM dc3_device_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type_flag = 1 UNION ALL SELECT event_type_flag FROM dc3_driver_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type_flag = 1 ) merged GROUP BY event_type_flag ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT * FROM ((SELECT id, 'device' AS source, device_id AS source_id, point_id, event_type_flag, confirm_flag, create_time, COALESCE(event_ext ->> 'content', '') AS message FROM dc3_device_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type_flag = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}) UNION ALL (SELECT id, 'driver' AS source, driver_id AS source_id, 0, event_type_flag, confirm_flag, create_time, COALESCE(event_ext ->> 'content', '') AS message FROM dc3_driver_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type_flag = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit})) unioned ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT date_trunc('hour', create_time) AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS count FROM (SELECT create_time FROM dc3_device_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type_flag = 1 AND create_time >= #{from} UNION ALL SELECT create_time FROM dc3_driver_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type_flag = 1 AND create_time >= #{from}) merged GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket ASC

SELECT 'device' AS source, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dc3_device_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type_flag = 1 AND create_time >= #{from}) AS total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dc3_device_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type_flag = 1 AND confirm_flag = 0 AND create_time >= #{from}) AS unconfirmed UNION ALL SELECT 'driver' AS source, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dc3_driver_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type_flag = 1 AND create_time >= #{from}) AS total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dc3_driver_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type_flag = 1 AND confirm_flag = 0 AND create_time >= #{from}) AS unconfirmed

choose.when: UPDATE dc3_device_event SET confirm_flag = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE dc3_driver_event SET confirm_flag = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE dc3_device_event SET confirm_flag = 0 WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE dc3_driver_event SET confirm_flag = 0 WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0

mapper.select: SELECT date ::text AS date, device_count, driver_count FROM (SELECT d.day AS date, COALESCE(dev.cnt, 0) AS device_count, COALESCE(drv.cnt, 0) AS driver_count FROM (SELECT generate_series(date_trunc('day', #{from})::date, CURRENT_DATE, '1 day') ::date AS day) d LEFT JOIN (SELECT date_trunc('day', create_time)::date AS day, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM dc3_device_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type_flag = 1 AND create_time >= #{from} GROUP BY day) dev ON d.day = dev.day LEFT JOIN (SELECT date_trunc('day', create_time)::date AS day, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM dc3_driver_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type_flag = 1 AND create_time >= #{from} GROUP BY day) drv ON d.day = drv.day) result ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT * FROM ((SELECT 'device' AS source, device_id AS source_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM dc3_device_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type_flag = 1 AND create_time >= #{from} GROUP BY device_id ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT #{limit}) UNION ALL (SELECT 'driver' AS source, driver_id AS source_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM dc3_driver_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type_flag = 1 AND create_time >= #{from} GROUP BY driver_id ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT #{limit})) unioned ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT dow, hour, SUM(count) AS count FROM (SELECT EXTRACT(DOW FROM create_time)::int AS dow, EXTRACT(HOUR FROM create_time)::int AS hour, COUNT(*) AS count FROM dc3_device_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type_flag = 1 AND create_time >= #{from} GROUP BY dow, hour UNION ALL SELECT EXTRACT(DOW FROM create_time)::int AS dow, EXTRACT(HOUR FROM create_time)::int AS hour, COUNT(*) AS count FROM dc3_driver_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type_flag = 1 AND create_time >= #{from} GROUP BY dow, hour) u GROUP BY dow, hour

SELECT type AS key, SUM(count) AS count FROM (SELECT event_ext ->> 'type' AS type, COUNT (*) AS count FROM dc3_device_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type_flag = 1 AND create_time >= #{from} GROUP BY type UNION ALL SELECT event_ext ->> 'type' AS type, COUNT (*) AS count FROM dc3_driver_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type_flag = 1 AND create_time >= #{from} GROUP BY type) u WHERE type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY type ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT * FROM ((SELECT 'device' AS source, device_id AS source_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM dc3_device_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type_flag = 1 AND create_time >= #{from} GROUP BY device_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= #{minCount}) UNION ALL (SELECT 'driver' AS source, driver_id AS source_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM dc3_driver_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type_flag = 1 AND create_time >= #{from} GROUP BY driver_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= #{minCount})) unioned ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT * FROM ((SELECT 'device' AS source, device_id AS source_id, event_type_flag, COUNT(*) AS count FROM dc3_device_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND create_time >= #{from} GROUP BY device_id, event_type_flag HAVING COUNT(*) >= #{minCount}) UNION ALL (SELECT 'driver' AS source, driver_id AS source_id, event_type_flag, COUNT(*) AS count FROM dc3_driver_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND create_time >= #{from} GROUP BY driver_id, event_type_flag HAVING COUNT(*) >= #{minCount})) u ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

WITH ev AS (SELECT 'device'::text AS source, device_id AS source_id, event_type_flag, create_time, id FROM dc3_device_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND create_time >= #{from} UNION ALL SELECT 'driver'::text AS source, driver_id AS source_id, event_type_flag, create_time, id FROM dc3_driver_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND create_time >= #{from}) SELECT e1.source AS a_source, e1.source_id AS a_source_id, e1.event_type_flag AS a_event_type, e2.source AS b_source, e2.source_id AS b_source_id, e2.event_type_flag AS b_event_type, COUNT(*) AS co_count FROM ev e1 JOIN ev e2 ON abs(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e1.create_time - e2.create_time))) <= #{windowSec} AND (e1.source <> e2.source OR e1.source_id <> e2.source_id) AND (e1.source, e1.source_id, e1.event_type_flag) < (e2.source, e2.source_id, e2.event_type_flag) GROUP BY e1.source, e1.source_id, e1.event_type_flag, e2.source, e2.source_id, e2.event_type_flag ORDER BY co_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT pb.profile_id AS profile_id, de.device_id AS device_id, COUNT(*) AS alarm_count FROM dc3_device_event de JOIN dc3_manager.dc3_profile_bind pb ON pb.device_id = de.device_id AND pb.tenant_id = de.tenant_id AND pb.deleted = 0 WHERE de.deleted = 0 AND de.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND de.event_type_flag = 1 AND de.create_time >= #{from} GROUP BY pb.profile_id, de.device_id

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN age < INTERVAL '1 hour' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS under_1h, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN age >= INTERVAL '1 hour' AND age < INTERVAL '6 hours' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS h1_to_6, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN age >= INTERVAL '6 hours' AND age < INTERVAL '24 hours' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS h6_to_24, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN age >= INTERVAL '24 hours' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS over_24h, COUNT(*) AS total FROM (SELECT NOW() - create_time AS age FROM dc3_device_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND confirm_flag = 0 UNION ALL SELECT NOW() - create_time FROM dc3_driver_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND confirm_flag = 0) ages

SELECT to_char(DATE(create_time), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS date, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (operate_time - create_time)) * 1000) AS p50_ms, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (operate_time - create_time)) * 1000) AS p95_ms, COUNT(*) AS confirmed_count FROM (SELECT create_time, operate_time FROM dc3_device_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND confirm_flag = 1 AND create_time >= #{from} UNION ALL SELECT create_time, operate_time FROM dc3_driver_event WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND confirm_flag = 1 AND create_time >= #{from}) u GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT d.service_name AS service_name, COUNT(DISTINCT d.id) AS driver_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.enable_flag = 1 THEN d.id END) AS enabled_count, COUNT(DISTINCT dev.id) AS device_count FROM dc3_manager.dc3_driver d LEFT JOIN dc3_manager.dc3_device dev ON dev.driver_id = d.id AND dev.tenant_id = d.tenant_id AND dev.deleted = 0 WHERE d.deleted = 0 AND d.tenant_id = #{tenantId} GROUP BY d.service_name ORDER BY device_count DESC, driver_count DESC

SELECT kind, id AS entity_id, operate_time FROM (SELECT 'driver'::text AS kind, id, operate_time, create_time FROM dc3_manager.dc3_driver WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND operate_time > create_time AND operate_time >= #{from} UNION ALL SELECT 'device'::text, id, operate_time, create_time FROM dc3_manager.dc3_device WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND operate_time > create_time AND operate_time >= #{from} UNION ALL SELECT 'profile'::text, id, operate_time, create_time FROM dc3_manager.dc3_profile WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND operate_time > create_time AND operate_time >= #{from}) u ORDER BY operate_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
